acds_session_create_params_t(3) Library Functions Manual acds_session_create_params_t(3)

NAME

acds_session_create_params_t - Session creation request parameters.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/acip/acds_client.h>

Data Fields


uint8_t identity_pubkey [32]
Ed25519 public key (host identity). uint8_t identity_seckey [64]
Ed25519 secret key (for signing). uint8_t capabilities
Bit 0: video, Bit 1: audio. uint8_t max_participants
Maximum participants (1-8). bool has_password
Password protection enabled. char password [128]
Optional password (if has_password). bool acds_expose_ip
Explicitly allow public IP disclosure (--acds-expose-ip opt-in). uint8_t session_type
acds_session_type_t: 0=DIRECT_TCP (default), 1=WEBRTC const char * reserved_string
Optional reserved string (NULL = auto-generate). char server_address [64]
Server address where clients should connect. uint16_t server_port
Server port where clients should connect.

Detailed Description

Session creation request parameters.

Definition at line 159 of file acds_client.h.

Field Documentation

Explicitly allow public IP disclosure (--acds-expose-ip opt-in).
